message:
refactor(search): use map_or_else for two-tier search fallback path

Simplifies the TwoTierBridge search result handling by replacing the
nested if-let/else with map_or_else, which is both more idiomatic and
satisfies clippy's option_if_let_else lint. The behavior is unchanged:
if select_best_two_tier_results returns Some, convert to search results;
otherwise fall back to the plain FTS search path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
